name: conflict surfacer appends one line per conflict instead of overwriting prior entries
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus && printf '{"pattern_id":"p1","classification":"conflict"}\n' > d1.json && printf '{"pattern_id":"p2","classification":"conflict"}\n' > d2.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/surface-conflict.sh" --decision d1.json --log pr-corpus/decisions.jsonl 2>/dev/null && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/surface-conflict.sh" --decision d2.json --log pr-corpus/decisions.jsonl 2>err.txt && [ "$(wc -l < pr-corpus/decisions.jsonl)" = "2" ] && echo ok 1>&2
